key_findings: 100% verification pass rate on kernel hits is the strongest result
False negatives caused by narrow alias table (7 errors)
False positives caused by missing artifact precondition (4 errors)
72.5% vs 55% vs 45% gap is real but measures narrow routing decision quality
two_fixes_to_85_percent: Expand alias tables with 10-15 paraphrase variants (fixes false negatives)
Add artifact-scoping precondition to comparison kernel (fixes false positives)
analysis.honest_assessment: Controlled demo with 2 kernels and synthetic tasks. Not competitive with LangChain/DSPy/MemGPT benchmarks yet. The 100% verification on kernel hits is a real novel contribution not present in other systems.
